issue.message: Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 26)
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details

"faq_title" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"faq_back" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"help_menu_faq" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"faq_q1_question" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="faq_q1_question">Why does Fauxx sometimes stop and show a “Tap to resume protection” notification?</string>

issue.message: "faq_q1_answer" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="faq_q1_answer">Android 14 and newer cap the kind of background service Fauxx uses to 6 cumulative hours per 24 hours while the app is in the background. To stay safely under that ceiling, Fauxx voluntarily stops itself a bit early and posts a one-tap notification so you can resume when you next pick up your phone.

You'll typically see this notification:

• In the morning if you have quiet hours configured (default 7am–11pm). Rather than burn the daily budget idling overnight, Fauxx stops at 11pm and reappears at 7am as a tap-to-resume.
• After about 5 hours of continuous backgrounded run-time. Fauxx self-stops at 5h with a 1h safety margin under the OS limit.
• After a long no-WiFi pause if you have “WiFi only” enabled. Sustained pauses past 30 minutes release the slot rather than spinning idle.

Tapping the notification opens Fauxx and restarts protection. Nothing is lost — your settings, profile, persona, and action log are persistent.

This affects the F-Droid / sideload build specifically. The Play Store build uses a different foreground-service type that doesn't have the 6-hour cap; the behavior is otherwise identical.</string>

issue.message: "faq_q2_question" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="faq_q2_question">Sometimes I enable protection and it stops almost immediately — why?</string>

issue.message: "faq_q2_answer" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="faq_q2_answer">Fauxx tracks how much foreground-service time you\'ve used in the past 24 hours, persisted across app restarts. If you\'ve already used most of the daily budget — for example a 4-hour session earlier today — a new session has less room before the cap resets. Fauxx will start, see there\'s no headroom left, and post the tap-to-resume notification scheduled for when the budget window expires.\n\nYou can wait for the notification to fire later, or check Settings → Active hours and WiFi only to confirm your constraint settings aren\'t pausing the engine.</string>

issue.message: "faq_q3_question" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="faq_q3_question">Why did Fauxx crash overnight on older versions?</string>

issue.message: "faq_q3_answer" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="faq_q3_answer">Versions before this release didn\'t proactively stop the foreground service during long pauses, so it could accumulate the full 6 hours of cumulative runtime while idle — for example during configured quiet hours. When Android 14+ enforced the limit, the system force-stopped the process with a ForegroundServiceDidNotStopInTimeException. This release adds the budget tracker and the tap-to-resume flow described above, so the crash should no longer occur.\n\nIf you\'re still seeing crashes, please file an issue from Settings (“File a GitHub issue”).</string>

issue.message: "faq_q4_question" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="faq_q4_question">What does “Noise Ratio” on the Dashboard mean?</string>

issue.message: "faq_q4_answer" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="faq_q4_answer">It's a throughput indicator: actions today divided by 500, capped at 100%. 500 actions in a day reads as a saturated 100%.

It does NOT measure the quality of the noise — whether the synthetic activity is hitting off-profile categories, fooling profiling systems, or covering a diverse range of topics. It's just a rate gauge.

For a view of where the noise is actually going, check the Targeting screen's category-weight chart. Red bars are categories Fauxx is suppressing (because they match your real profile), green bars are categories it's boosting, gray is neutral.</string>

issue.message: "faq_q5_question" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="faq_q5_question">How does the “Adversarial Scraper” (Layer 2) work, and why does it sometimes say “Last scraped: Never”?</string>

issue.message: "faq_q5_answer" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="faq_q5_answer">Layer 2 reads your existing ad-platform interest profiles from Google Ads Settings and Facebook Ad Preferences. It uses those to find categories the ad networks have already learned about you, then tells the engine to suppress them — so the synthetic activity steers away from your real profile.

Things to know:

• Takes up to about 60 seconds: each platform has a 30-second timeout and Google + Facebook run sequentially.
• Does NOT log you in. Fauxx reads cookies that are already on your device. You need to be signed into myadcenter.google.com and Facebook's ad preferences page in your browser first, otherwise the scraper silently returns zero categories and “Last scraped” stays as “Never.”
• Read-only. The scraper never modifies, clicks, or interacts with your ad-platform settings — it just reads what's already there.
• Auto-refreshes every 7 days on WiFi once Layer 2 is enabled. “Scrape Now” is a manual override that works on cellular too.

If you're on v0.2.6 or older and “Scrape Now” doesn't seem to do anything, that's a bug fixed in v0.2.7.</string>

issue.message: "boot_guard_safe_mode_notice" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="boot_guard_safe_mode_notice">Fauxx disabled Layer 2 and the engine after repeated startup hangs. Re-enable them from Targeting and Dashboard when you\'re ready to try again.</string>

issue.message: "module_appsignal_name" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"module_appsignal_description" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="module_appsignal_description">Opens app store pages for off-profile apps to trigger attribution pixels</string>

issue.message: "module_location_setup_dialog_title" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"module_location_setup_dialog_body" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="module_location_setup_dialog_body">Android requires you to designate Fauxx as the mock location app:

1. Enable Developer Options if you haven't yet: Settings → About phone → tap Build Number 7 times.

2. Open Developer Options → "Select mock location app" and choose Fauxx.

Without this step, Location Spoofing will silently do nothing.</string>

issue.message: "module_location_success_title" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"module_location_success_body" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="module_location_success_body">Fauxx is registered as the system mock-location provider and feeding synthetic GPS fixes.</string>

issue.message: "module_location_failure_not_mock_app_title" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="module_location_failure_not_mock_app_title">Fauxx is not the mock location app</string>

issue.message: "module_location_failure_not_mock_app_body" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="module_location_failure_not_mock_app_body">Open Developer Options → Select mock location app → choose Fauxx, then restart the engine.</string>

issue.message: "module_location_failure_security_title" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"module_location_failure_security_body" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="module_location_failure_security_body">The system blocked addTestProvider despite the app op being allowed. Try toggling Fauxx off and back on under Developer Options → Select mock location app, then restart Fauxx.</string>

issue.message: "module_location_failure_runtime_title" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"module_location_failure_runtime_body" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="module_location_failure_runtime_body">Android refused the mock provider for an unexpected reason. Check app logs for details.</string>

issue.message: "settings_custom_ua_title" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"settings_custom_ua_description" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_custom_ua_description">By default, Fauxx rotates between many browser identifiers — but real people usually use one browser, so the variety can itself look like bot traffic. Tap below to use this device\'s built-in browser identifier instead, so the noise blends with your real activity. Leave blank to keep the default rotation.</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="targeting_custom_interests_description">Add specific interests to suppress (mapped to nearest category)</string>

issue.message: "targeting_custom_interest_mapped" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"targeting_custom_interest_unmapped" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"targeting_scrape_dialog_title" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
"targeting_scrape_dialog_body" is not translated in "ru" (Russian)
issue.errorLine1:
<string name="targeting_scrape_dialog_body">The Adversarial Scraper tries to read what Google and Facebook think they know about you, then steers the noise away from those interests. It just got back an empty list, which usually means the scraper has no signed-in session for those sites.

Heads-up: Fauxx's scraper has its own browser session, separate from Chrome/Brave/Firefox where you may already be signed in — Android doesn't let apps share login cookies with each other. And Google/Facebook don't allow sign-in from an in-app browser either, so a 'sign in here' button isn't possible.

Layer 2 is being redesigned to import your ad profile directly (via Google Takeout or a browser bookmarklet) so it doesn't need a live session at all. In the meantime, Layers 1 and 3 still work without any scraping.</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_resume_reboot_desc">После перезагрузки показывать уведомление для возобновления защиты. Android не дает приложениям незаметно запускаться в фоне, поэтому нужен тап.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.settings_active_hours_narrow_warning` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_active_hours_narrow_warning">Узкое окно активности (%1$d ч) само может стать отслеживаемым сигналом. Более широкие окна (12 ч+) сложнее отличить от обычного поведения.</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="dashboard_notification_denied">Разрешение на уведомления отклонено — индикатор фоновой активности скрыт. Разрешите уведомления в настройках, чтобы видеть статус защиты.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.dashboard_battery_optimization_warning` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dashboard_battery_optimization_warning">Оптимизация батареи Android ограничивает Fauxx. Фоновая активность будет останавливаться при выключенном экране. Разрешите неограниченную фоновую работу, чтобы движок продолжал работать.</string>
